info.name: multitenancy001-e2e (v100 HEAVY DATA POPULATION GRID)
info.description: V100 heavy data population grid baseada no contrato funcional validado do projeto. Popula multiplas contas, usuarios de control plane, billings, usuarios tenant, categorias, subcategorias, fornecedores, customers, produtos, inventario e vendas multi-item via requisicoes HTTP.

exec: pm.test('Control plane login OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
pm.test('Signup tenant grid OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(201); });
postman.setNextRequest('02.01 create control plane user grid');
pm.test('Control plane user grid request accepted', function () { pm.expect([200,201,409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
postman.setNextRequest('02.01 create control plane user grid');
if (!accountIds.length) throw new Error('tenant_account_ids vazio para billing');
pm.test('Tenant loop init OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
if (!email) throw new Error('tenant admin email ausente para tenant_loop_index=' + idx);
pm.test('Tenant admin login OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
pm.test('Tenant user grid request accepted', function () { pm.expect([200,201,409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if (!categories.length) throw new Error('Sem categorias para criar subcategorias');
if (!categories.length) throw new Error('Sem categorias para produtos');
const subcategoryId = subcategories.length ? Number(subcategories[idx % subcategories.length]) : null;
const supplierId = suppliers.length ? suppliers[idx % suppliers.length] : null;
const ref = { id, name: String((j && j.name) || `Produto Seed ${idx + 1}`), price: Number((j && j.price) || 10) };
if (!refs.length) throw new Error('Sem products para inventory');
pm.test('Inventory inbound grid request accepted', function () { pm.expect([200,201,400]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if (!refs.length) throw new Error('Sem products para sales');
if (!customers.length) throw new Error('Sem customers para sales');
else postman.setNextRequest('04.10 read tenant sale sample');
pm.test('Read tenant sale sample accepted', function () { pm.expect([200,404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Advance tenant loop OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
pm.test('Final control plane accounts smoke OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
if (!email) throw new Error('Sem tenant admin email para final login');
pm.test('Final first tenant login OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
pm.test('Tenant me smoke OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); }); postman.setNextRequest('99.04 products smoke');
pm.test('Products smoke OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); }); postman.setNextRequest('99.05 customers smoke');
pm.test('Customers smoke OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); }); postman.setNextRequest('99.06 final summary');
